name: remotedeskpbx
description: RemoteDeskPBX — two apps: Client (shares screen) and Employee (remote control)

scripts.build:main: npm run build:main:client && npm run build:main:employee
scripts.build:renderer: npm run build:renderer:client && npm run build:renderer:employee
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.start:client: npm run build:main:client && npm run build:renderer:client && electron dist/main/client.js
scripts.start:employee: npm run build:main:employee && npm run build:renderer:employee && electron dist/main/employee.js
scripts.pack:client: npm run build:main:client && npm run build:renderer:client && electron-builder --config electron-builder.client.yml --win portable
scripts.pack:employee: npm run build:main:employee && npm run build:renderer:employee && electron-builder --config electron-builder.employee.yml --win portable
scripts.pack: npm run pack:client && npm run pack:employee
